![Hispanic Female Investor Meeting With A Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2362/hispanic-female-investor-meeting-with-a-client.jpg?crop=0,0.084266830065359483,0,0.0769096405228758&cropmode=percentage&width=1903&height=713&rnd=134182468380000000) ![Hispanic Female Investor Meeting With A Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2362/hispanic-female-investor-meeting-with-a-client.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=750&height=1068&rnd=134182468380000000)
# Investment Consulting Tailored for the Institutional Investor
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
The global investment landscape is increasingly complex. Institutional investors need the guidance of an experienced consultant with proprietary research and cutting-edge tools to produce optimal results.
Work with us.
## Who we are
Segal Marco Advisors is one of the largest U.S.-based investment consulting firms, with combined discretionary and advisory assets exceeding $600 billion.
For more than 55 years, we’ve been advising organizations on investment strategy.
[Our History ](https://www.segalmarco.com/about-us/our-story)
![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266030000000) ![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266030000000)
### We’re one of the largest U.S.-based investment consultants.
![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266460000000) ![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266460000000)
## Independent advice you can count on
We’re proud to be an independent, employee-owned firm, which enables us to provide objective, high-quality advice.
Our senior professionals average more than 25 years of experience and have invested through all types of market conditions. They’ll draw on their expertise and Segal Marco’s research and technology to help your organization craft a comprehensive strategy or review and refine your existing one — and then execute it to help your organization achieve its investment objectives.
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
## Research to help you make informed decisions
Find clarity in today’s markets with our proprietary research. You’ll have access to thought leadership and analysis to help your decision-making.
[Learn About Our Research ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-research)
![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266780000000) ![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266780000000)
![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182268050000000) ![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182268050000000)
## A team that understands your challenges
You want to work with someone who has a proven track record of success in your industry. With our deep bench of investment consultants, we have the experience you seek. From Taft-Hartley plans and non-profits to Fortune 500 companies, we’ve got you covered.
[See Who We Help ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-industries)
## You can delegate decision-making about investing to us
We offer discretionary investment management so your team can concentrate on what you do best without having to worry about staying on top of the ever-evolving investment industry. As your outsourced chief investment officer (OCIO), we’ll take care of your portfolio.
![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171379150000000) ![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171379150000000)
![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171378870000000) ![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171378870000000)
## We can take care of proxy voting on your behalf
Proxy voting is one of our corporate governance services.
Each year, thousands of companies trust us to vote their proxies. Let us vote for your organization, guided by your proxy voting policy.
[Corporate Governance Services ](https://www.segalmarco.com/corporate-governance)
### Key statistics
0 +
**Clients in the U.S. served in a discretionary or advisory role**
$ 0 B +
**Combined advisory assets**
0 +
**Our longest client relationships span over 30 years.**
#  Ready to take a fresh look at your investment program?
Let’s start a conversation about how we can help.
[Contact Us ](https://www.segalmarco.com/contact-us)
## Read our latest insights
[The Advisor’s Edge: Expanding Access to Alternative Investments Through Technology](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-insights/expanding-access-to-alternative-investments-through-technology/)
[February 2026 Market Update](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-insights/february-2026-market-update/)

**Don’t miss out. Join 16,000 others who already get the latest insights from Segal and Segal Marco Advisors.**

[Learn More](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/consulting "Learn More")


# Helping Small Businesses Is Our Job
If you are an aspiring entrepreneur or an existing business owner in Maryland… the Maryland Small Business Development Center (SBDC) offers FREE individualized consulting, from start up to established businesses. Maryland SBDC also offers comprehensive training programs, from those just thinking about starting a business to executive training, with most classes at low to no cost. The Maryland SBDC Network provides Maryland small business owners with access to trusted business advisors who have experience in starting and growing businesses. We offer expertise and keen insights essential to helping you manage your concerns today, and design solid, long-range plans to secure your vision for tomorrow. Please note: We have always been only able to assist those legally present in the United States.
[Request Assistance](https://mdsbdc.ecenterdirect.com/signup?reset=1)
## What We Do
Since 1988 the seasoned staff of the Maryland Small Business Development Center (SBDC) Network has provided sound advice consulting and support to entrepreneurs and small businesses across the state. We are part of a national SBDC network—founded in 1979—that helps over 500,000 U.S. businesses annually.
### Business Consulting
Get no- or low-cost consulting in the areas of MONEY MANAGEMENT and MARKETING.
[Learn About Business Consulting](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/consulting "Learn more about business consulting")
### Business Training
Get no- or low-cost training in the areas of MONEY MANAGEMENT and MARKETING.
[Learn About Business Training](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/training "Learn more about business training")
### Business Funding
We help you get funding for your business from a variety of sources.
[Learn About Business Funding](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/resources/finance-and-venture-capital "Learn more about business funding")
## Success Stories
Entrepreneurs have great ideas that they want to see manifested in a successful business. Most of the time they are missing some critical information guidance or skill that would make all the difference. Here are examples of Maryland SBDC clients who were able to succeed with our guidance.
![Volman HR Strategy, LLC](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/corridor-images/Justin-Volman%20\(crop\).jpg)  
### [Volman HR Strategy, LLC](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/success-stories/volman-hr-strategy--llc "Learn more about Volman HR Strategy, LLC") Corridor Region
![Riverbend Family Medicine](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/western-images/riverbend.png)  
### [Riverbend Family Medicine](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/success-stories/riverbend-family-medicine "Learn more about Riverbend Family Medicine") Western Region
![Bayview United Homecare Services LLC](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/southern-images/2025-09-24.webp)  
### [Bayview United Homecare Services LLC](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/success-stories/bayview-united-homecare-services-llc "Learn more about Bayview United Homecare Services LLC") Corridor Region
[Read More Success Stories](https://www.marylandsbdc.org/success-stories)
## SBA Resource Guide
Download the latest Resource Guide from the Small Business Administration.
[Download Guide](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Documents/SBA_Resourceguide_3120_2019.pdf "Download SBA Resource Guide PDF")
![Download SBA Resource Guide PDF](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/sba_resourceguide_3120_2019.jpg)
## Our Success Stats
  

### 212
New Maryland Businesses 
  

### 1288
Maryland Jobs Created 
  

### 64
Million In Sales Growth 
  

### 57
Million In Secured Loans 
The Maryland SBDC Program is funded in part through a Cooperative Agreement with the U.S. Small Business Administration. All opinions conclusions or recommendations expressed are those of the author(s) and do not necessarily reflect the views of the SBA. The support given by the U.S. Small Business Administration through such funding does not constitute an express or implied endorsement of any of the cosponsor's or participants' opinions products or services. All of SBA's programs and services are extended to the public on a non discriminatory basis.
[![America's SBDC](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/americas-sbdc.jpg)](https://americassbdc.org)
[![University of Maryland](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/university-of-maryland.jpg)](https://umd.edu)
[![Maryland Business Opportunity Center](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/mboc.jpg)](https://www.marylandboc.org)
[![Maryland Apex Accelerator](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/apex-accelerator.jpg)](https://www.marylandapex.org/program)
[![Small Business Administation](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/sba.jpg)](https://www.sba.gov)
* * *
## About Us
The Maryland SBDC is an accredited member of a national network. In addition to our support of small business development the SBDC is also accredited to provide intellectual property and technology commercialization assistance to businesses in the technology industry.
**Operating hours are dependent upon host location and are by appointment only. Please request assistance through our[Request Assistance](https://mdsbdc.ecenterdirect.com/signup?reset=1) page.**
![Find A Location text over Maryland map image](https://s3.amazonaws.com/bb-cms/AppData/Websites/1076/Images/ui/find-a-location2.png)
